next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: User asked total money earned for service line 'checklist rewrite and rollout pack' since start of January 2026, answer as number only. Date filter: all issued_on dates are >= 2026-01-01 (2026-01-12, 2026-02-10, 2026-04-14, 2026-04-20). Arithmetic from line items only: 390 + 390 + 780 + 390 = 1950. Ready to return numeric result only.
